scopes.reason: Awaiting native parser, semantic, and diagnostic-span coverage.
Examples remain stage-0 compilation coverage until their required frontend features are parity-ready.
Native bootstrap probes are not differential cases until their stage-0 outcome and normalized diagnostic contract are verified.

entries.name: simple
entries.reason: Verified success baseline.

entries.name: builtin_sizeof
entries.reason: Verified nested type-context builtin parsing and integer result typing.

entries.name: qualified_heap_alloc
entries.reason: Verified nested call-argument ownership, imported field types, and error-union recovery parsing.

entries.name: array_literal_codegen
entries.reason: Verified explicit array literal type and element expression parsing.

entries.name: array_literal_count_mismatch
entries.reason: Verified array element-count category and overlapping source location.

entries.name: array_address_of_element_pointer
entries.reason: Verified address-of an array value is accepted in a compatible pointer call context.

entries.name: array_assignment_no_decay
entries.reason: Verified fixed-array assignment preserves array semantics without requiring pointer decay.

entries.name: array_indexing
entries.reason: Verified fixed-array indexing and element expression typing.

entries.name: array_pointer_decay
entries.reason: Verified fixed-array coercion to a compatible element pointer.

entries.name: generic_function_codegen
entries.reason: Verified generic parameter parsing and direct explicit-call result substitution.

entries.name: generic_struct_codegen
entries.reason: Verified generic type-reference parsing and generic struct literal checking.

entries.name: generic_mangling_collision_codegen
entries.reason: Verified nested multi-argument generic type capture in returns and struct literals without treating inner commas as declaration separators.

entries.name: generic_enum_codegen
entries.reason: Verified retained postfix generic arguments on enum-member expressions and concrete nominal return checking.

entries.name: generic_union_codegen
entries.reason: Verified generic union pattern bindings with direct concrete member-type substitution.

entries.name: generic_wrapped_types_codegen
entries.reason: Verified indexing an array-wrapped generic struct member preserves its wrapper until the concrete element type is required.

entries.name: runtime_generic_struct
entries.reason: Verified direct generic member substitution through nested concrete generic struct values.

entries.name: runtime_union_match_binding
entries.reason: Verified non-generic union case bindings remain lexically scoped to their case body.

entries.name: match_union_requires_exhaustive_or_else
entries.reason: Verified union variant coverage reports the stable match-exhaustiveness category at the match span.

entries.name: generic_function_value_variable_codegen
entries.reason: Verified delimiter-terminated explicit generic function values and local callback invocation.

entries.name: global_function_value_initializer_codegen

entries.name: generic_function_value_import_alias_codegen
entries.reason: Verified qualified imported generic function values, including an explicit specialization in parentheses.

entries.name: import_alias_function_value
entries.reason: Verified direct exported function lookup through a file alias when passed as a callback.

entries.name: runtime_bool_match
entries.reason: Verified boolean match/case parsing with an exhaustive success case.

entries.name: match_bool_requires_exhaustive_or_else
entries.reason: Verified boolean match exhaustiveness category and overlapping match span.

entries.name: runtime_enum_match
entries.reason: Verified enum member resolution and exhaustive enum match success.

entries.name: match_enum_requires_exhaustive_or_else
entries.reason: Verified enum match exhaustiveness category and overlapping match span.

entries.name: runtime_for_loop
entries.reason: Verified initializer, condition, update, nested control flow, and loop body parsing.

entries.name: runtime_tagged_union
entries.reason: Verified union tag/member field parsing and case-body control flow without pattern bindings.

entries.name: invalid_string_escape
entries.reason: Verified lexical invalid-escape phase, category, file, and opening-quote span.

entries.name: c_header_extern_type

entries.reason: Verified aliased enum member lookup in both frontends.

entries.name: import_private
entries.reason: Verified private imported functions are rejected with a stable unknown-name diagnostic.

entries.name: import_transitive
entries.reason: Verified transitive imports do not re-export their dependencies into the direct importer scope.

entries.name: import_cycle
entries.reason: Verified recursive imports reuse the in-progress graph node without reparsing it.

entries.name: import_canonical_cycle
entries.reason: Verified canonicalized recursive imports share one graph node.

entries.name: bool_condition_required
entries.reason: Verified if-condition boolean typing, category, and overlapping condition span.

entries.name: break_outside_while
entries.reason: Verified break is rejected outside a while or for loop at the keyword span.

entries.reason: Verified continue is rejected outside a while or for loop at the keyword span.

entries.name: duplicate_local_rejected
entries.reason: Verified same-scope local redeclaration while permitting lexical block shadowing.

entries.name: duplicate_parameter_rejected
entries.reason: Verified duplicate function parameters are rejected at the declaration span.

entries.name: duplicate_struct_field_rejected
entries.reason: Verified repeated struct fields are rejected at the second member span.

entries.name: union_duplicate_variant_rejected
entries.reason: Verified repeated union variants are rejected at the second member span.

entries.name: enum_duplicate_value_rejected
entries.reason: Verified repeated explicit integer enum values are rejected at the repeated member span.

entries.name: const_requires_initializer
entries.reason: Verified local const declarations require an initializer at the declaration span.

entries.name: assign_const_rejected
entries.reason: Verified assignments to local const bindings are rejected at the assignment target span.

entries.name: unary_not_requires_bool
entries.reason: Verified unary not requires a boolean operand at the unary expression span.

entries.name: logical_operator_requires_bool
entries.reason: Verified logical operators require boolean operands at the offending operand span.

entries.name: comparison_operand_rules
entries.reason: Verified comparison operands preserve pointer identity and reject invalid ordered comparisons.

entries.name: error_duplicate_value_rejected
entries.reason: Verified explicit error values are unique at the repeated declaration span.

entries.name: error_declaration_invalid
entries.reason: Verified error declarations require numeric literal initializers at the declaration span.

entries.name: function_type_mismatch_params
entries.reason: Verified direct function values match callback parameter signatures.

entries.name: function_type_mismatch_return
entries.reason: Verified direct function values match callback return signatures.

entries.name: pointer_level_mismatch_argument
entries.reason: Verified pointer call arguments preserve indirection level and pointee type.

entries.name: generic_nominal_assignment_rejected
entries.reason: Verified distinct generic struct specializations remain nominally incompatible.

entries.name: generic_enum_nominal_assignment_rejected
entries.reason: Verified distinct generic enum specializations remain nominally incompatible.

entries.name: generic_non_generic_enum_rejected
entries.reason: Verified non-generic enums cannot be treated as generic specializations.

entries.name: generic_union_nominal_assignment_rejected
entries.reason: Verified distinct generic union specializations remain nominally incompatible.

entries.name: numeric_argument_signedness_requires_cast
entries.reason: Verified typed signed values require an explicit cast before an unsigned call parameter.

entries.name: missing_return_if_branch
entries.reason: Verified a value-returning function requires an alternate path when an if branch alone returns.

entries.name: catch_in_if_branch_missing_return
entries.reason: Verified branch-local catch recovery does not make a value-returning function exhaustive.

entries.name: switch_case_type_mismatch
entries.reason: Verified switch cases are comparable to the operand type.

entries.name: switch_duplicate_case_rejected
entries.reason: Verified duplicate scalar switch cases are rejected at the repeated value.

entries.name: switch_enum_requires_exhaustive_or_else
entries.reason: Verified enum switches cover every member or provide an else branch.

entries.name: switch_operand_type_rejected
entries.reason: Verified switch operands are restricted to integer, boolean, and enum types.

entries.name: import_alias_missing_export
entries.reason: Verified qualified imports reject non-exported symbols.

entries.name: import_alias_unqualified_type_rejected
entries.reason: Verified imported types remain inaccessible without the required export path.

entries.name: import_no_transitive_reexport

entries.name: export_direct_import_private_rejected

entries.reason: Verified pointer plus/minus integer expressions retain their pointer result type.
